_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to apply exponent laws to numerical expressions with integer exponents, including negative exponents.

_source.w: We are learning to apply exponent laws to numerical expressions with integer exponents, including negative exponents.
y: Negative exponents allow us to express very small numbers and reciprocals compactly, extending the power of exponential notation.
Mastering exponent laws provides the algebraic fluency needed for scientific notation, growth and decay models and higher mathematics.
These skills are essential for physics, chemistry, engineering and any discipline that works with quantities across vastly different scales.
eg: Using negative exponents to rewrite 1/a⁴ as a⁻⁴.
